T001.did: Encoded the footer-button-matrix oracle as a typed, reusable fixture (rows + zone partitions) for the determinism tests.

T002.did: Added runningStepArtifactReady/runningStepStartedAt/runningStepLabel to the core ViewerState interface.

T003.did: Added the viewerStateUpdated message (complete viewerState + complete NavState) to the extension ExtensionToViewerMessage union.

T004.did: Mirrored the new ViewerState fields in the webview types and made viewerStateUpdated.navState a complete (non-partial) NavState.

T005.did: Populated the run-step/generating fields in deriveViewerState (startedAt/label from the running step; artifact-ready injected by the provider since the pure function can't probe disk).

T006.did: Extracted one shared buildViewerPayload builder; both sendContentUpdateMessage and refreshContextIfDisplaying now emit a COMPLETE viewerState + navState (no more 3-field partial).

T007.did: Replaced the 4-source status fallback chain with status = viewerState.status only.

T008.did: Deleted the legacy navState.footerState render branch so exactly two shapes remain (CatalogFooter, GeneratingFooter).

T009.did: Computed the generating/run-step gate from viewerState and removed all navState footer-decision reads (only enhancementButtons remain, the documented carve-out).

T010.did: Sourced GeneratingFooter's running-step label from viewerState instead of navState.

T011.did: Confirmed the viewerState signal is the footer's sole reactive input; the footer no longer depends on the navState signal for any decision.

T012.did: viewerStateUpdated now fully replaces navState (complete payload), closing the early-arrival race and the stale/partial read.

T013.did: Added footer determinism tests (idempotence, state-preserving re-derivation, viewed-tab independence, external-change re-derivation, implemented gate).

T014.did: Rewrote the webview FooterActions test for the single-source model (stale navState can't hide a button; generating reverts on artifact-ready and on timeout).

T015.did: Verified the serialized approve label resolves to the next step at each pause stage and is hidden on implement; no gating change was needed.

T016.did: Verified the closure controls surface per matrix (Mark Completed+Archive at implemented, Reactivate+Archive at completed, Reactivate at archived) via the oracle test rows.

T017.did: Added pause-stage oracle tests asserting the derived footer equals the matrix Left+Right set for each canonical pause status.

T018.did: Confirmed step-tab class derivation reads from the refreshed viewerState/navState snapshot; the complete-payload refresh keeps tabs in sync (no stale read).

T019.did: Verified a workflow-advancing action updates the step-tab indicator without a reopen — it rides the same complete-payload refresh, with no tab-only state path.

T020.did: Added step-tab sync tests (enabled/checkmark match true per-step state; indicator updates after an advancing action).
concerns: Plan named webview/src/spec-viewer/navigation.ts, which doesn't exist; tab-class derivation lives in StepTab.tsx, so the tests live there instead.

T021.did: Updated docs/viewer-states.md to the single-source (viewerState-only) footer model and replaced the stale legacy matrix with the canonical contract matrix.

T022.did: Rewrote FooterActions.stories.tsx and mockData to drive only viewerState; removed the legacy-fallback story variants and added the generating/artifact-ready/timeout states.

T023.did: Removed the dead footer duplicates (footerState interface, runningStep* fields) from NavState and the initial-HTML generator + generateHtml signature.
concerns: Kept NavState.activeStep (read by StepTab/NavigationBar for in-flight visuals) and NavState.specStatus (header badge fallback) — these are not footer-only, so removing them was out of scope.

T024.did: Ran npm run compile + compile-web + jest — all green (810 tests, 68 suites); demo fixtures left untouched.
concerns: The manual issue #193 repro in quickstart.md (driving the live VS Code viewer) is a user-side step I cannot perform headlessly.
